Help Center / Support / Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 23, 2026

Tadimaru LLC ("we," "our," or "us") sets out the following policy regarding the handling of personal information in services related to "Railway Dispatch Simulator."

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following information through our inquiry form:

  • Your name
  • Your email address
  • The content of your inquiry

2. Purpose of Use

We use the collected personal information only for the following purposes:

  • Responding to and handling inquiries
  • Investigating and fixing bugs
  • Improving our services

3. Provision to Third Parties

Except as required by law, we will not provide collected personal information to any third party.

4. Information Management

We take appropriate measures to prevent leakage, loss, or damage of the personal information we collect.

5. Deletion of Information

Upon request from the individual, we will promptly delete the personal information we have collected. If you would like your information deleted, please contact us using the address below.

6. Web Analytics

This support site uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google LLC, to understand how the site is used. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect traffic data. The data is collected anonymously and does not personally identify users.

You can opt out of this data collection by disabling cookies in your browser settings. For more information about Google Analytics terms of service, please see the Google Analytics Terms of Service.

7. Contact

Tadimaru LLC
Email: support@tadimaru.com
